chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 991 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4136/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6900/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 15.05.2024 Mr. Rakesh Kumar Dhalore, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Case of petitioner is that he has applied before respondent No.5 Mukhtiarkar, Pano Aqil for demarcation of his land admeasuring 59-07 acres in Block No.132/2 and others, and 32-00 acres in Block No.134/4, 5 and others, total area of 91-07 acres, situated in Deh Naro Amul Hati, Taluka Pano Aqil, District Sukkur, as private respondents under a false claim are trying to encroach upon it. But it has not been decided yet. Learned AAG Sindh submits that application of the petitioner would be decided within a period of one month and measurement of the subject area would be conducted in accordance with law. He, however, requests that SSP Sukkur may be directed to provide necessary assistance to the survey / demarcation team at the time of demarcation. SSP Sukkur is directed to provide proper assistance to the survey / demarcation team at the time of such exercise, which shall, however, be conducted within a period of two months after considering and deciding the application of petitioner in accordance with law. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of along with listed applications, in above terms. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of Additional Advocate General Sindh and SSP Sukkur for a perusal and compliance.

Accordingly, the petition is disposed of along with listed applications, in above terms. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of Additional Advocate General Sindh and SSP Sukkur for a perusal and compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
